class.name: AudioStreamPlaylist
class.brief_description: Stores multiple sub-[AudioStream]s, which will be played in sequence.
class.description: [AudioStreamPlaylist] can play multiple streams in sequence. The order can be manually set, or shuffled with [member shuffle]. A stream can be set with [method set_list_stream]. [b]Tip:[/b] This stream is ideal if you want to have alternating music tracks, like a radio station.

method.name: get_bpm
method.description: Returns the tempo of the currently playing stream, in beats per minute (BPM).

method.name: get_list_stream
method.description: Returns the [AudioStream] at the given [param stream_index].

method.name: set_list_stream
method.description: Sets an [param audio_stream] at the given [param stream_index].

members.member: Fade-out time used when a stream ends, and switching to the next one (without fade-in). It may be preferred to have a tail end on the streams at the same length as this property.
If [code]true[/code], the playlist will loop, otherwise the playlist will end when the last stream is finished.
If [code]true[/code], the playlist will shuffle each time playback starts and each time it loops.
Number of streams in the playlist.

constants.constant: Maximum number of streams supported in the playlist.
